note: As-built set. No before/ set: the repo was greenfield, so there was no existing flow to compare against (plan ① drew no charts/before/).

diagrams.title: As-built data flow: DSL → parse → layout(dagre) → SVG/ASCII/DOM → html/png/element/CLI
As-built modules & types: DiagramModel, PositionedModel/RoutedEdge, geometry, renderers, exports
Interactive runtime: mount → drag node → live edge re-route → persist/restore layout
